archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Organic Elements (Health & Trust Focus)
rationale: For an HR & Admin health insurance portal, we need extreme clarity, authority, and trust (Swiss). However, to avoid the cold 'fintech' feel, we inject organic textures and warm accents (Terracotta/Pine).

visual_enhancers.texture: Use a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) over colored backgrounds to kill digital flatness.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-accent text-white hover:bg-brand-accent_hover transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
buttons.secondary: bg-brand-primary text-white hover:bg-brand-primary_hover transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
buttons.outline: border border-black/10 text-text-primary hover:bg-black/5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold

cards.style: bg-surface-card rounded-2xl border-borders-default shadow-soft overflow-hidden transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-float

inputs.style: bg-background-secondary border border-black/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-accent focus:border-transparent transition-all

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center min-h-[85vh]
sections.left_col: col-span-1 lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col gap-6 items-start
sections.details: Massive typography on the left. The right column should feature an abstract composition (using the team_photo or paper texture) overlaid with a floating 'Endorsement Approved' UI card (glassmorphism).

sections.name: Trusted By (Marquee)
sections.layout: py-12 border-y border-black/5 overflow-hidden flex items-center bg-background-secondary
sections.details: A slow, smooth continuous marquee of text/logos. Use 'react-fast-marquee'. Opacity 50% for logos/text to keep it subtle.

sections.name: Endorsement Features (Bento Grid)
sections.details: Mode B (Control Room Grid). Showcase Additions, Deletions, Corrections. Include a tall card (col-span-1 row-span-2) for 'Real-time Sync', and a wide card (col-span-2) for 'HR Workflow'.

sections.name: AI & Notifications Integration
sections.details: Left side: A large photo of the smartphone notification or HR team working, masked with a sharp rectangular cut. Right side: Features highlighting AI validation and WhatsApp/Email immediate dispatch.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.details: A 3-column grid of quotes. Use simple cards with high padding, a small circular portrait avatar, and a stark sans-serif quote text.

sections.name: CTA & Footer
sections.details: Massive 'Ready to streamline?' heading in white. Huge primary CTA button. A grid below for standard footer links.

hero_texture.usage: Use as a subtle background layer or mask for the hero section.

team_working_hr.alt: HR team looking at a screen
team_working_hr.usage: Image for the AI Features or Hero section right column.

mobile_notification.usage: Use in the WhatsApp/Email Notification section.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons should use slight scale (-translate-y-[2px]) and drop-shadow on hover. Use ease-out transition.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Elements should fade in and slide up slightly (y: 20 -> 0) as they enter the viewport using framer-motion 'whileInView'.
motion_and_interactions.bento_cards: On hover, the border color shifts to brand-primary, and a soft glow or shadow appears.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='login-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Use 'framer-motion' for scroll reveal animations and micro-interactions.
Use 'react-fast-marquee' for the Trusted By section.

Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and use 'Cabinet Grotesk' via fontsource or a custom webfont setup if possible, otherwise fallback to standard system sans with extreme tracking adjustments, or load a similar Google Font like 'Outfit' or 'Space Grotesk' if custom fonts fail. Wait, user can't easily install local fonts without assets. Instruct the agent to import 'Outfit' (for headings) and 'Manrope' (for body) from Google Fonts in index.css as a substitute for Cabinet/Satoshi.
Follow the generous spacing guidelines (py-24 to py-32). Do not cramp sections.

Build the UI directly with Tailwind CSS. Use Shadcn only for complex interactive components like form inputs or dialogs, though for a landing page, pure Tailwind is preferred for maximum layout control.
Ensure the hero section does not use a flat blanket dark overlay. The image should be cleanly integrated.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL buttons, links, and forms.
